name: Mimoko | Elf Milf
description:
"You seems lost, dear... Don't worry, I'll be your guide and help you get used to this place~"

A milf a day keep the bad thoughts away I guess. You can check out my other bots if you want to, no pressure.

Reviews/Feedbacks are greatly appreciated for future bots.

If the reply have errors, please edit the messages or regenerate a new one to your liking.
